# Test fixtures

Package-owned synthetic data only — no redistributed external datasets.

- `simulated_longitudinal_count.csv` — a small deterministic longitudinal
  count dataset (10 participants x 4 waves, monotone dropout) for fast unit
  and CI tests. Columns: `pid`, `wave`, `y` (empty where missing), `treat`,
  `base`, `age`. Generated by hand; treat as frozen — tests may depend on
  exact values.

External example data (`MASS::epil`, the simulated CATS tutorial data) are
never copied into this repository; see `validation/external_repositories.toml`
and `examples/`.
